prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次约11975→11238→14943→10311→13354，整体波动较大，2023年因理科计划缩减位次后移至14943，2024年新高考改革后物理类位次回升 至10311，2025年又后移至13354；2025年基准约13354名；本省理科组计划2021年5人、2022年3人、2023年4人、2024年1人、2025年1人，近年持续缩减；2026年 计划大幅增至17人，较2025年扩招1600%，竞争显著缓和，位次预计大幅后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2025年约第180名，2026年升至第177 名，排名稳中有升；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园管理争议；抖音热度排名第18（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高，可能部分抵消扩招带来 的竞争缓和效应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校理科组招生专业以康复物理治疗、应用心理学、运动康复等为主，其中 康复治疗类属医学技术方向，社会热度平稳；本省2026年普通高考总人数约218700人，较2025年（历史类+物理类约179817人）明显增加，整体竞争加剧；北京 体育大学位于北京市，对本省考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13354名、2026年招生计划从1人扩至17 人（扩招1600%）使位次大幅后移、抖音高热关注度部分抵消扩招效应、本省考生总数增加加剧竞争等因素，预测2026年最低位次约141602名，区间141102–142102名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest ranking for the science group was approximately 11975 → 11238 → 14943 → 10311 → 13354, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to a reduction in science plan, the ranking moved back to 14943. After the new college entrance examination reform in 2024, the physics category ranking rebounded to 10311, but moved back to 13354 in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 13354. The provincial science group plan had 5 people in 2021, 3 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 1 in 2024, and 1 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction in recent years. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 17 people, an expansion of 1600% compared to 2025, greatly easing competition, and the ranking is expected to move back significantly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 180th in the 2025 Soft Science Main Ranking, rising to 177th in 2026, showing a steady increase. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus management controversies. Douyin popularity ranking is 18th (high heat), with large short video exposure and high application attention, which may partially offset the competition easing effect brought by expansion.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's science group enrollment majors mainly include Rehabilitation Physical Therapy, Applied Psychology, Sports Rehabilitation, etc. Among them, rehabilitation therapy belongs to the medical technology direction, with stable social popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province is approximately 218,700, a significant increase from 2025 (history category + physics category approximately 179,817), intensifying overall competition. Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, which has a certain regional appeal to candidates in this province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13354, the 2026 enrollment plan expanding from 1 to 17 (a 1600% increase) causing a significant backward shift in ranking, the high Douyin attention partially offsetting the expansion effect, and the increase in the total number of candidates in the province intensifying competition, the predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is approximately 141602, with a range of 141102–142102.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 141102–142102, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<141102), you can focus on sprinting for relatively popular majors such as Applied Psychology.
